Default: `auto`.One of the following:"generate"[](<#\(resource\)%20responses%20%3E%20\(method\)%20create%20%3E%20\(params\)%200.non_streaming%20%3E%20\(param\)%20input%20%3E%20\(schema\)%20%3E%20\(variant\)%201%20%3E%20\(items\)%20%3E%20\(variant\)%2010%20%3E%20\(property\)%20tools%20%3E%20\(items\)%20%3E%20\(variant\)%207%20%3E%20\(property\)%20action%20%3E%20\(member\)%200>)"edit"[](<#\(resource\)%20responses%20%3E%20\(method\)%20create%20%3E%20\(params\)%200.non_streaming%20%3E%20\(param\)%20input%20%3E%20\(schema\)%20%3E%20\(variant\)%201%20%3E%20\(items\)%20%3E%20\(variant\)%2010%20%3E%20\(property\)%20tools%20%3E%20\(items\)%20%3E%20\(variant\)%207%20%3E%20\(property\)%20action%20%3E%20\(member\)%201>)"auto"[](<#\(resource\)%20responses%20%3E%20\(method\)%20create%20%3E%20\(params\)%200.non_streaming%20%3E%20\(param\)%20input%20%3E%20\(schema\)%20%3E%20\(variant\)%201%20%3E%20\(items\)%20%3E%20\(variant\)%2010%20%3E%20\(property\)%20tools%20%3E%20\(items\)%20%3E%20\(variant\)%207%20%3E%20\(property\)%20action%20%3E%20\(member\)%202>)[](<#\(resource\)%20responses%20%3E%20\(method\)%20create%20%3E%20\(params\)%200.non_streaming%20%3E%20\(param\)%20input%20%3E%20\(schema\)%20%3E%20\(variant\)%201%20%3E%20\(items\)%20%3E%20\(variant\)%2010%20%3E%20\(property\)%20tools%20%3E%20\(items\)%20%3E%20\(variant\)%207%20%3E%20\(property\)%20action>)background: optional "transparent" or "opaque" or "auto"Background type for the generated image. One of `transparent`, `opaque`, or `auto`. Default: `auto`.One of the following:"transparent"[](<#\(resource\)%20responses%20%3E%20\(method\)%20create%20%3E%20\(params\)%200.non_streaming%20%3E%20\(param\)%20input%20%3E%20\(schema\)%20%3E%20\(variant\)%201%20%3E%20\(items\)%20%3E%20\(variant\)%2010%20%3E%20\(property\)%20tools%20%3E%20\(items\)%20%3E%20\(variant\)%207%20%3E%20\(property\)%20background%20%3E%20\(member\)%200>)"opaque"[](<#\(resource\)%20responses%20%3E%20\(method\)%20create%20%3E%20\(params\)%200.non_streaming%20%3E%20\(param\)%20input%20%3E%20\(schema\)%20%3E%20\(variant\)%201%20%3E%20\(items\)%20%3E%20\(variant\)%2010%20%3E%20\(property\)%20tools%20%3E%20\(items\)%20%3E%20\(variant\)%207%20%3E%20\(property\)%20background%20%3E%20\(member\)%201>)"auto"[](<#\(resource\)%20responses%20%3E%20\(method\)%20create%20%3E%20\(params\)%200.non_streaming%20%3E%20\(param\)%20input%20%3E%20\(schema\)%20%3E%20\(variant\)%201%20%3E%20\(items\)%20%3E%20\(variant\)%2010%20%3E%20\(property\)%20tools%20%3E%20\(items\)%20%3E%20\(variant\)%207%20%3E%20\(property\)%20background%20%3E%20\(member\)%202>)[](<#\(resource\)%20responses%20%3E%20\(method\)%20create%20%3E%20\(params\)%200.non_streaming%20%3E%20\(param\)%20input%20%3E%20\(schema\)%20%3E%20\(variant\)%201%20%3E%20\(items\)%20%3E%20\(variant\)%2010%20%3E%20\(property\)%20tools%20%3E%20\(items\)%20%3E%20\(variant\)%207%20%3E%20\(property\)%20background>)input_fidelity: optional "high" or "low"Control how much effort the model will exert to match the style and features, especially facial features, of input images. This parameter is only supported for `gpt-image-1` and `gpt-image-1.5` and later models, unsupported for `gpt-image-1-mini`. Supports `high` and `low`. Defaults to `low`.One of the following:"high"[](<#\(resource\)%20responses%20%3E%20\(method\)%20create%20%3E%20\(params\)%200.non_streaming%20%3E%20\(param\)%20input%20%3E%20\(schema\)%20%3E%20\(variant\)%201%20%3E%20\(items\)%20%3E%20\(variant\)%2010%20%3E%20\(property\)%20tools%20%3E%20\(items\)%20%3E%20\(variant\)%207%20%3E%20\(property\)%20input_fidelity%20%3E%20\(member\)%200>)"low"[](<#\(resource\)%20responses%20%3E%20\(method\)%20create%20%3E%20\(params\)%200.non_streaming%20%3E%20\(param\)%20input%20%3E%20\(schema\)%20%3E%20\(variant\)%201%20%3E%20\(items\)%20%3E%20\(variant\)%2010%20%3E%20\(property\)%20tools%20%3E%20\(items\)%20%3E%20\(variant\)%207%20%3E%20\(property\)%20input_fidelity%20%3E%20\(member\)%201>)[](<#\(resource\)%20responses%20%3E%20\(method\)%20create%20%3E%20\(params\)%200.non_streaming%20%3E%20\(param\)%20input%20%3E%20\(schema\)%20%3E%20\(variant\)%201%20%3E%20\(items\)%20%3E%20\(variant\)%2010%20%3E%20\(property\)%20tools%20%3E%20\(items\)%20%3E%20\(variant\)%207%20%3E%20\(property\)%20input_fidelity>)input_image_mask: optional object { file_id, image_url } Optional mask for inpainting. Contains `image_url` (string, optional) and `file_id` (string, optional).file_id: optional stringFile ID for the mask image.[](<#\(resource\)%20responses%20%3E%20\(method\)%20create%20%3E%20\(params\)%200.non_streaming%20%3E%20\(param\)%20input%20%3E%20\(schema\)%20%3E%20\(variant\)%201%20%3E%20\(items\)%20%3E%20\(variant\)%2010%20%3E%20\(property\)%20tools%20%3E%20\(items\)%20%3E%20\(variant\)%207%20%3E%20\(property\)%20input_image_mask%20%3E%20\(property\)%20file_id>)image_url: optional stringBase64-encoded mask image.[](<#\(resource\)%20responses%20%3E%20\(method\)%20create%20%3E%20\(params\)%200.non_streaming%20%3E%20\(param\)%20input%20%3E%20\(schema\)%20%3E%20\(variant\)%201%20%3E%20\(items\)%20%3E%20\(variant\)%2010%20%3E%20\(property\)%20tools%20%3E%20\(items\)%20%3E%20\(variant\)%207%20%3E%20\(property\)%20input_image_mask%20%3E%20\(property\)%20image_url>)[](<#\(resource\)%20responses%20%3E%20\(method\)%20create%20%3E%20\(params\)%200.non_streaming%20%3E%20\(param\)%20input%20%3E%20\(schema\)%20%3E%20\(variant\)%201%20%3E%20\(items\)%20%3E%20\(variant\)%2010%20%3E%20\(property\)%20tools%20%3E%20\(items\)%20%3E%20\(variant\)%207%20%3E%20\(property\)%20input_image_mask>)model: optional string or "gpt-image-1" or "gpt-image-1-mini" or "gpt-image-1.5"The image generation model to use. Default: `gpt-image-1`.One of the following:string[](<#\(resource\)%20responses%20%3E%20\(method\)%20create%20%3E%20\(params\)%200.non_streaming%20%3E%20\(param\)%20input%20%3E%20\(schema\)%20%3E%20\(variant\)%201%20%3E%20\(items\)%20%3E%20\(variant\)%2010%20%3E%20\(property\)%20tools%20%3E%20\(items\)%20%3E%20\(variant\)%207%20%3E%20\(property\)%20model%20%3E%20\(variant\)%200>)"gpt-image-1" or "gpt-image-1-mini" or "gpt-image-1.5"The image generation model to use. Default: `gpt-image-1`.One of the following:"gpt-image-1"[](<#\(resource\)%20responses%20%3E%20\(method\)%20create%20%3E%20\(params\)%200.non_streaming%20%3E%20\(param\)%20input%20%3E%20\(schema\)%20%3E%20\(variant\)%201%20%3E%20\(items\)%20%3E%20\(variant\)%2010%20%3E%20\(property\)%20tools%20%3E%20\(items\)%20%3E%20\(variant\)%207%20%3E%20\(property\)%20model%20%3E%20\(variant\)%201%20%3E%20\(member\)%200>)"gpt-image-1-mini"[](<#\(resource\)%20responses%20%3E%20\(method\)%20create%20%3E%20\(params\)%200.non_streaming%20%3E%20\(param\)%20input%20%3E%20\(schema\)%20%3E%20\(variant\)%201%20%3E%20\(items\)%20%3E%20\(variant\)%2010%20%3E%20\(property\)%20tools%20%3E%20\(items\)%20%3E%20\(variant\)%207%20%3E%20\(property\)%20model%20%3E%20\(variant\)%201%20%3E%20\(member\)%201>)"gpt-image-1.5"[](<#\(resource\)%20responses%20%3E%20\(method\)%20create%20%3E%20\(params\)%200.non_streaming%20%3E%20\(param\)%20input%20%3E%20\(schema\)%20%3E%20\(variant\)%201%20%3E%20\(items\)%20%3E%20\(variant\)%2010%20%3E%20\(property\)%20tools%20%3E%20\(items\)%20%3E%20\(variant\)%207%20%3E%20\(property\)%20model%20%3E%20\(variant\)%201%20%3E%20\(member\)%202>)[](<#\(resource\)%20responses%20%3E%20\(method\)%20create%20%3E%20\(params\)%200.non_streaming%20%3E%20\(param\)%20input%20%3E%20\(schema\)%20%3E%20\(variant\)%201%20%3E%20\(items\)%20%3E%20\(variant\)%2010%20%3E%20\(property\)%20tools%20%3E%20\(items\)%20%3E%20\(variant\)%207%20%3E%20\(property\)%20model%20%3E%20\(variant\)%201>)[](<#\(resource\)%20responses%20%3E%20\(method\)%20create%20%3E%20\(params\)%200.non_streaming%20%3E%20\(param\)%20input%20%3E%20\(schema\)%20%3E%20\(variant\)%201%20%3E%20\(items\)%20%3E%20\(variant\)%2010%20%3E%20\(property\)%20tools%20%3E%20\(items\)%20%3E%20\(variant\)%207%20%3E%20\(property\)%20model>)moderation: optional "auto" or "low"Moderation level for the generated image. Default: `auto`.One of the following:"auto"[](<#\(resource\)%20responses%20%3E%20\(method\)%20create%20%3E%20\(params\)%200.non_streaming%20%3E%20\(param\)%20input%20%3E%20\(schema\)%20%3E%20\(variant\)%201%20%3E%20\(items\)%20%3E%20\(variant\)%2010%20%3E%20\(property\)%20tools%20%3E%20\(items\)%20%3E%20\(variant\)%207%20%3E%20\(property\)%20moderation%20%3E%20\(member\)%200>)"low"[](<#\(resource\)%20responses%20%3E%20\(method\)%20create%20%3E%20\(params\)%200.non_streaming%20%3E%20\(param\)%20input%20%3E%20\(schema\)%20%3E%20\(variant\)%201%20%3E%20\(items\)%20%3E%20\(variant\)%2010%20%3E%20\(property\)%20tools%20%3E%20\(items\)%20%3E%20\(variant\)%207%20%3E%20\(property\)%20moderation%20%3E%20\(member\)%201>)[](<#\(resource\)%20responses%20%3E%20\(method\)%20create%20%3E%20\(params\)%200.non_streaming%20%3E%20\(param\)%20input%20%3E%20\(schema\)%20%3E%20\(variant\)%201%20%3E%20\(items\)%20%3E%20\(variant\)%2010%20%3E%20\(property\)%20tools%20%3E%20\(items\)%20%3E%20\(variant\)%207%20%3E%20\(property\)%20moderation>)output_compression: optional numberCompression level for the output image. Default: 100.minimum0maximum100[](<#\(resource\)%20responses%20%3E%20\(method\)%20create%20%3E%20\(params\)%200.non_streaming%20%3E%20\(param\)%20input%20%3E%20\(schema\)%20%3E%20\(variant\)%201%20%3E%20\(items\)%20%3E%20\(variant\)%2010%20%3E%20\(property\)%20tools%20%3E%20\(items\)%20%3E%20\(variant\)%207%20%3E%20\(property\)%20output_compression>)output_format: optional "png" or "webp" or "jpeg"The output format of the generated image. One of `png`, `webp`, or `jpeg`. Default: `png`.One of the following:"png"[](<#\(resource\)%20responses%20%3E%20\(method\)%20create%20%3E%20\(params\)%200.non_streaming%20%3E%20\(param\)%20input%20%3E%20\(schema\)%20%3E%20\(variant\)%201%20%3E%20\(items\)%20%3E%20\(variant\)%2010%20%3E%20\(property\)%20tools%20%3E%20\(items\)%20%3E%20\(variant\)%207%20%3E%20\(property\)%20output_format%20%3E%20\(member\)%200>)"webp"[](<#\(resource\)%20responses%20%3E%20\(method\)%20create%20%3E%20\(params\)%200.non_streaming%20%3E%20\(param\)%20input%20%3E%20\(schema\)%20%3E%20\(variant\)%201%20%3E%20\(items\)%20%3E%20\(variant\)%2010%20%3E%20\(property\)%20tools%20%3E%20\(items\)%20%3E%20\(variant\)%207%20%3E%20\(property\)%20output_format%20%3E%20\(member\)%201>)"jpeg"[](<#\(resource\)%20responses%20%3E%20\(method\)%20create%20%3E%20\(params\)%200.non_streaming%20%3E%20\(param\)%20input%20%3E%20\(schema\)%20%3E%20\(variant\)%201%20%3E%20\(items\)%20%3E%20\(variant\)%2010%20%3E%20\(property\)%20tools%20%3E%20\(items\)%20%3E%20\(variant\)%207%20%3E%20\(property\)%20output_format%20%3E%20\(member\)%202>)[](<#\(resource\)%20responses%20%3E%20\(method\)%20create%20%3E%20\(params\)%200.non_streaming%20%3E%20\(param\)%20input%20%3E%20\(schema\)%20%3E%20\(variant\)%201%20%3E%20\(items\)%20%3E%20\(variant\)%2010%20%3E%20\(property\)%20tools%20%3E%20\(items\)%20%3E%20\(variant\)%207%20%3E%20\(property\)%20output_format>)partial_images: optional numberNumber of partial images to generate in streaming mode, from 0 (default value) to 3.minimum0maximum3[](<#\(resource\)%20responses%20%3E%20\(method\)%20create%20%3E%20\(params\)%200.non_streaming%20%3E%20\(param\)%20input%20%3E%20\(schema\)%20%3E%20\(variant\)%201%20%3E%20\(items\)%20%3E%20\(variant\)%2010%20%3E%20\(property\)%20tools%20%3E%20\(items\)%20%3E%20\(variant\)%207%20%3E%20\(property\)%20partial_images>)quality: optional "low" or "medium" or "high" or "auto"The quality of the generated image. One of `low`, `medium`, `high`, or `auto`. Default: `auto`.One of the following:"low"[](<#\(resource\)%20responses%20%3E%20\(method\)%20create%20%3E%20\(params\)%200.non_streaming%20%3E%20\(param\)%20input%20%3E%20\(schema\)%20%3E%20\(variant\)%201%20%3E%20\(items\)%20%3E%20\(variant\)%2010%20%3E%20\(property\)%20tools%20%3E%20\(items\)%20%3E%20\(variant\)%207%20%3E%20\(property\)%20quality%20%3E%20\(member\)%200>)"medium"[](<#\(resource\)%20responses%20%3E%20\(method\)%20create%20%3E%20\(params\)%200.non_streaming%20%3E%20\(param\)%20input%20%3E%20\(schema\)%20%3E%20\(variant\)%201%20%3E%20\(items\)%20%3E%20\(variant\)%2010%20%3E%20\(property\)%20tools%20%3E%20\(items\)%20%3E%20\(variant\)%207%20%3E%20\(property\)%20quality%20%3E%20\(member\)%201>)"high"[](<#\(resource\)%20responses%20%3E%20\(method\)%20create%20%3E%20\(params\)%200.non_streaming%20%3E%20\(param\)%20input%20%3E%20\(schema\)%20%3E%20\(variant\)%201%20%3E%20\(items\)%20%3E%20\(variant\)%2010%20%3E%20\(property\)%20tools%20%3E%20\(items\)%20%3E%20\(variant\)%207%20%3E%20\(property\)%20quality%20%3E%20\(member\)%202>)"auto"[](<#\(resource\)%20responses%20%3E%20\(method\)%20create%20%3E%20\(params\)%200.non_streaming%20%3E%20\(param\)%20input%20%3E%20\(schema\)%20%3E%20\(variant\)%201%20%3E%20\(items\)%20%3E%20\(variant\)%2010%20%3E%20\(property\)%20tools%20%3E%20\(items\)%20%3E%20\(variant\)%207%20%3E%20\(property\)%20quality%20%3E%20\(member\)%203>)[](<#\(resource\)%20responses%20%3E%20\(method\)%20create%20%3E%20\(params\)%200.non_streaming%20%3E%20\(param\)%20input%20%3E%20\(schema\)%20%3E%20\(variant\)%201%20%3E%20\(items\)%20%3E%20\(variant\)%2010%20%3E%20\(property\)%20tools%20%3E%20\(items\)%20%3E%20\(variant\)%207%20%3E%20\(property\)%20quality>)size: optional "1024x1024" or "1024x1536" or "1536x1024" or "auto"The size of the generated image. One of `1024x1024`, `1024x1536`, `1536x1024`, or `auto`. Default: `auto`.One of the following:"1024x1024"[](<#\(resource\)%20responses%20%3E%20\(method\)%20create%20%3E%20\(params\)%200.non_streaming%20%3E%20\(param\)%20input%20%3E%20\(schema\)%20%3E%20\(variant\)%201%20%3E%20\(items\)%20%3E%20\(variant\)%2010%20%3E%20\(property\)%20tools%20%3E%20\(items\)%20%3E%20\(variant\)%207%20%3E%20\(property\)%20size%20%3E%20\(member\)%200>)"1024x1536"[](<#\(resource\)%20responses%20%3E%20\(method\)%20create%20%3E%20\(params\)%200.non_streaming%20%3E%20\(param\)%20input%20%3E%20\(schema\)%20%3E%20\(variant\)%201%20%3E%20\(items\)%20%3E%20\(variant\)%2010%20%3E%20\(property\)%20tools%20%3E%20\(items\)%20%3E%20\(variant\)%207%20%3E%20\(property\)%20size%20%3E%20\(member\)%201>)"1536x1024"[](<#\(resource\)%20responses%20%3E%20\(method\)%20create%20%3E%20\(params\)%200.non_streaming%20%3E%20\(param\)%20input%20%3E%20\(schema\)%20%3E%20\(variant\)%201%20%3E%20\(items\)%20%3E%20\(variant\)%2010%20%3E%20\(property\)%20tools%20%3E%20\(items\)%20%3E%20\(variant\)%207%20%3E%20\(property\)%20size%20%3E%20\(member\)%202>)"auto"[](<#\(resource\)%20responses%20%3E%20\(method\)%20create%20%3E%20\(params\)%200.non_streaming%20%3E%20\(param\)%20input%20%3E%20\(schema\)%20%3E%20\(variant\)%201%20%3E%20\(items\)%20%3E%20\(variant\)%2010%20%3E%20\(property\)%20tools%20%3E%20\(items\)%20%3E%20\(variant\)%207%20%3E%20\(property\)%20size%20%3E%20\(member\)%203>)[](<#\(resource\)%20responses%20%3E%20\(method\)%20create%20%3E%20\(params\)%200.non_streaming%20%3E%20\(param\)%20input%20%3E%20\(schema\)%20%3E%20\(variant\)%201%20%3E%20\(items\)%20%3E%20\(variant\)%2010%20%3E%20\(property\)%20tools%20%3E%20\(items\)%20%3E%20\(variant\)%207%20%3E%20\(property\)%20size>)[](<#\(resource\)%20responses%20%3E%20\(method\)%20create%20%3E%20\(params\)%200.non_streaming%20%3E%20\(param\)%20input%20%3E%20\(schema\)%20%3E%20\(variant\)%201%20%3E%20\(items\)%20%3E%20\(variant\)%2010%20%3E%20\(property\)%20tools%20%3E%20\(items\)%20%3E%20\(variant\)%207>)LocalShell object { type } A tool that allows the model to execute shell commands in a local environment.type: "local_shell"The type of the local shell tool. `shell`.[](<#\(resource\)%20responses%20%3E%20\(method\)%20create%20%3E%20\(params\)%200.non_streaming%20%3E%20\(param\)%20input%20%3E%20\(schema\)%20%3E%20\(variant\)%201%20%3E%20\(items\)%20%3E%20\(variant\)%2010%20%3E%20\(property\)%20tools%20%3E%20\(items\)%20%3E%20\(variant\)%209%20%3E%20\(property\)%20type>)environment: object { type, file_ids, memory_limit, 2 more } type: "container_auto"Automatically creates a container for this following:"server"[](<#\(resource\)%20responses%20%3E%20\(method\)%20create%20%3E%20\(params\)%200.non_streaming%20%3E%20\(param\)%20input%20%3E%20\(schema\)%20%3E%20\(variant\)%201%20%3E%20\(items\)%20%3E%20\(variant\)%2010%20%3E%20\(property\)%20execution%20%3E%20\(member\)%200>)"client"[](<#\(resource\)%20responses%20%3E%20\(method\)%20create%20%3E%20\(params\)%200.non_streaming%20%3E%20\(param\)%20input%20%3E%20\(schema\)%20%3E%20\(variant\)%201%20%3E%20\(items\)%20%3E%20\(variant\)%2010%20%3E%20\(property\)%20execution%20%3E%20\(member\)%201>)[](<#\(resource\)%20responses%20%3E%20\(method\)%20create%20%3E%20\(params\)%200.non_streaming%20%3E%20\(param\)%20input%20%3E%20\(schema\)%20%3E%20\(variant\)%201%20%3E%20\(items\)%20%3E%20\(variant\)%2010%20%3E%20\(property\)%20execution>)status: following:"in_progress"[](<#\(resource\)%20responses%20%3E%20\(method\)%20create%20%3E%20\(params\)%200.non_streaming%20%3E%20\(param\)%20input%20%3E%20\(schema\)%20%3E%20\(variant\)%201%20%3E%20\(items\)%20%3E%20\(variant\)%2010%20%3E%20\(property\)%20status%20%3E%20\(member\)%200>)"completed"[](<#\(resource\)%20responses%20%3E%20\(method\)%20create%20%3E%20\(params\)%200.non_streaming%20%3E%20\(param\)%20input%20%3E%20\(schema\)%20%3E%20\(variant\)%201%20%3E%20\(items\)%20%3E%20\(variant\)%2010%20%3E%20\(property\)%20status%20%3E%20\(member\)%201>)"incomplete"[](<#\(resource\)%20responses%20%3E%20\(method\)%20create%20%3E%20\(params\)%200.non_streaming%20%3E%20\(param\)%20input%20%3E%20\(schema\)%20%3E%20\(variant\)%201%20%3E%20\(items\)%20%3E%20\(variant\)%2010%20%3E%20\(property\)%20status%20%3E%20\(member\)%202>)[](<#\(resource\)%20responses%20%3E%20\(method\)%20create%20%3E%20\(params\)%200.non_streaming%20%3E%20\(param\)%20input%20%3E%20\(schema\)%20%3E%20\(variant\)%201%20%3E%20\(items\)%20%3E%20\(variant\)%2010%20%3E%20\(property\)%20status>)[](<#\(resource\)%20responses%20%3E%20\(method\)%20create%20%3E%20\(params\)%200.non_streaming%20%3E%20\(param\)%20input%20%3E%20\(schema\)%20%3E%20\(variant\)%201%20%3E%20\(items\)%20%3E%20\(variant\)%2010>)Reasoning object { id, summary, type, 3 more } A description of the chain of thought used by a reasoning model while generating a response. Be sure to include these items in your `input` to the Responses API for subsequent turns of a conversation if you are manually [managing context](</docs/guides/conversation-state>).id: stringThe unique identifier of the reasoning content.[](<#\(resource\)%20responses%20%3E%20\(method\)%20create%20%3E%20\(params\)%200.non_streaming%20%3E%20\(param\)%20input%20%3E%20\(schema\)%20%3E%20\(variant\)%201%20%3E%20\(items\)%20%3E%20\(variant\)%2011%20%3E%20\(property\)%20id>)summary: array of [SummaryTextContent](</api/reference/resources/conversations#\(resource\)%20conversations%20%3E%20\(model\)%20summary_text_content%20%3E%20\(schema\)>) { text, type } Reasoning summary content.text: stringA summary of the reasoning output from the model so far.[](<#\(resource\)%20conversations%20%3E%20\(model\)%20summary_text_content%20%3E%20\(schema\)%20%3E%20\(property\)%20text>)type: "summary_text"The type of the object. Always `summary_text`.[](<#\(resource\)%20conversations%20%3E%20\(model\)%20summary_text_content%20%3E%20\(schema\)%20%3E%20\(property\)%20type>)[](<#\(resource\)%20responses%20%3E%20\(method\)%20create%20%3E%20\(params\)%200.non_streaming%20%3E%20\(param\)%20input%20%3E%20\(schema\)%20%3E%20\(variant\)%201%20%3E%20\(items\)%20%3E%20\(variant\)%2011%20%3E%20\(property\)%20summary>)type: "reasoning"The type of the object. Always `reasoning`.[](<#\(resource\)%20responses%20%3E%20\(method\)%20create%20%3E%20\(params\)%200.non_streaming%20%3E%20\(param\)%20input%20%3E%20\(schema\)%20%3E%20\(variant\)%201%20%3E%20\(items\)%20%3E%20\(variant\)%2011%20%3E%20\(property\)%20type>)content: optional array of object { text, type } Reasoning text content.text: stringThe reasoning text from the model.[](<#\(resource\)%20responses%20%3E%20\(method\)%20create%20%3E%20\(params\)%200.non_streaming%20%3E%20\(param\)%20input%20%3E%20\(schema\)%20%3E%20\(variant\)%201%20%3E%20\(items\)%20%3E%20\(variant\)%2011%20%3E%20\(property\)%20content%20%3E%20\(items\)%20%3E%20\(property\)%20text>)type: "reasoning_text"The type of the reasoning text. Always `reasoning_text`.[](<#\(resource\)%20responses%20%3E%20\(method\)%20create%20%3E%20\(params\)%200.non_streaming%20%3E%20\(param\)%20input%20%3E%20\(schema\)%20%3E%20\(variant\)%201%20%3E%20\(items\)%20%3E%20\(variant\)%2011%20%3E%20\(property\)%20content%20%3E%20\(items\)%20%3E%20\(property\)%20type>)[](<#\(resource\)%20responses%20%3E%20\(method\)%20create%20%3E%20\(params\)%200.non_streaming%20%3E%20\(param\)%20input%20%3E%20\(schema\)%20%3E%20\(variant\)%201%20%3E%20\(items\)%20%3E%20\(variant\)%2011%20%3E%20\(property\)%20content>)encrypted_content: optional stringThe encrypted content of the reasoning item - populated when a response is generated with `reasoning.encrypted_content` in the `include` parameter.[](<#\(resource\)%20responses%20%3E%20\(method\)%20create%20%3E%20\(params\)%200.non_streaming%20%3E%20\(param\)%20input%20%3E%20\(schema\)%20%3E%20\(variant\)%201%20%3E%20\(items\)%20%3E%20\(variant\)%2011%20%3E%20\(property\)%20encrypted_content>)status: optional "in_progress" or "completed" or "incomplete"The status of the item. One of `in_progress`, `completed`, or `incomplete`. One of `in_progress`, `completed`, `incomplete`, `calling`, or `failed`.One of the following:"in_progress"[](<#\(resource\)%20responses%20%3E%20\(method\)%20create%20%3E%20\(params\)%200.non_streaming%20%3E%20\(param\)%20input%20%3E%20\(schema\)%20%3E%20\(variant\)%201%20%3E%20\(items\)%20%3E%20\(variant\)%2024%20%3E%20\(property\)%20status%20%3E%20\(member\)%200>)"completed"[](<#\(resource\)%20responses%20%3E%20\(method\)%20create%20%3E%20\(params\)%200.non_streaming%20%3E%20\(param\)%20input%20%3E%20\(schema\)%20%3E%20\(variant\)%201%20%3E%20\(items\)%20%3E%20\(variant\)%2024%20%3E%20\(property\)%20status%20%3E%20\(member\)%201>)"incomplete"[](<#\(resource\)%20responses%20%3E%20\(method\)%20create%20%3E%20\(params\)%200.non_streaming%20%3E%20\(param\)%20input%20%3E%20\(schema\)%20%3E%20\(variant\)%201%20%3E%20\(items\)%20%3E%20\(variant\)%2024%20%3E%20\(property\)%20status%20%3E%20\(member\)%202>)"calling"[](<#\(resource\)%20responses%20%3E%20\(method\)%20create%20%3E%20\(params\)%200.non_streaming%20%3E%20\(param\)%20input%20%3E%20\(schema\)%20%3E%20\(variant\)%201%20%3E%20\(items\)%20%3E%20\(variant\)%2024%20%3E%20\(property\)%20status%20%3E%20\(member\)%203>)"failed"[](<#\(resource\)%20responses%20%3E%20\(method\)%20create%20%3E%20\(params\)%200.non_streaming%20%3E%20\(param\)%20input%20%3E%20\(schema\)%20%3E%20\(variant\)%201%20%3E%20\(items\)%20%3E%20\(variant\)%2024%20%3E%20\(property\)%20status%20%3E%20\(member\)%204>)[](<#\(resource\)%20responses%20%3E%20\(method\)%20create%20%3E%20\(params\)%200.non_streaming%20%3E%20\(param\)%20input%20%3E%20\(schema\)%20%3E%20\(variant\)%201%20%3E%20\(items\)%20%3E%20\(variant\)%2024%20%3E%20\(property\)%20status>)[](<#\(resource\)%20responses%20%3E%20\(method\)%20create%20%3E%20\(params\)%200.non_streaming%20%3E%20\(param\)%20input%20%3E%20\(schema\)%20%3E%20\(variant\)%201%20%3E%20\(items\)%20%3E%20\(variant\)%2024>)CustomToolCallOutput object { call_id, output, type, id } The output of a custom tool call from your code, being sent back to the model.call_id: stringThe call ID, used to map this custom tool call output to a custom tool call.[](<#\(resource\)%20responses%20%3E%20\(method\)%20create%20%3E%20\(params\)%200.non_streaming%20%3E%20\(param\)%20input%20%3E%20\(schema\)%20%3E%20\(variant\)%201%20%3E%20\(items\)%20%3E%20\(variant\)%2025%20%3E%20\(property\)%20call_id>)output: string or array of [ResponseInputText](</api/reference/resources/responses#\(resource\)%20responses%20%3E%20\(model\)%20response_input_text%20%3E%20\(schema\)>) { text, type }  or [ResponseInputImage](</api/reference/resources/responses#\(resource\)%20responses%20%3E%20\(model\)%20response_input_image%20%3E%20\(schema\)>) { detail, type, file_id, image_url }  or [ResponseInputFile](</api/reference/resources/responses#\(resource\)%20responses%20%3E%20\(model\)%20response_input_file%20%3E%20\(schema\)>) { type, detail, file_data, 3 more } The output from the custom tool call generated by your code. Can be a string or an list of output content.One of the following:StringOutput = stringA string of the output of the custom tool call.[](<#\(resource\)%20responses%20%3E%20\(method\)%20create%20%3E%20\(params\)%200.non_streaming%20%3E%20\(param\)%20input%20%3E%20\(schema\)%20%3E%20\(variant\)%201%20%3E%20\(items\)%20%3E%20\(variant\)%2025%20%3E%20\(property\)%20output%20%3E%20\(variant\)%200>)OutputContentList = array of [ResponseInputText](</api/reference/resources/responses#\(resource\)%20responses%20%3E%20\(model\)%20response_input_text%20%3E%20\(schema\)>) { text, type }  or [ResponseInputImage](</api/reference/resources/responses#\(resource\)%20responses%20%3E%20\(model\)%20response_input_image%20%3E%20\(schema\)>) { detail, type, file_id, image_url }  or [ResponseInputFile](</api/reference/resources/responses#\(resource\)%20responses%20%3E%20\(model\)%20response_input_file%20%3E%20\(schema\)>) { type, detail, file_data, 3 more } Text, image, or file output of the custom tool call.One of the following:ResponseInputText object { text, type } A text input to the model.text: stringThe text input to the model.[](<#\(resource\)%20responses%20%3E%20\(model\)%20response_input_text%20%3E%20\(schema\)%20%3E%20\(property\)%20text>)type: "input_text"The type of the input item. Always `input_text`.[](<#\(resource\)%20responses%20%3E%20\(model\)%20response_input_text%20%3E%20\(schema\)%20%3E%20\(property\)%20type>)[](<#\(resource\)%20responses%20%3E%20\(model\)%20response_input_text%20%3E%20\(schema\)>)ResponseInputImage object { detail, type, file_id, image_url } An image input to the model. Learn about [image inputs](</docs/guides/vision>).detail: "low" or "high" or "auto" or "original"The detail level of the image to be sent to the model. One of `high`, `low`, `auto`, or `original`. Defaults to `auto`.One of the following:"low"[](<#\(resource\)%20responses%20%3E%20\(model\)%20response_input_image%20%3E%20\(schema\)%20%3E%20\(property\)%20detail%20%3E%20\(member\)%200>)"high"[](<#\(resource\)%20responses%20%3E%20\(model\)%20response_input_image%20%3E%20\(schema\)%20%3E%20\(property\)%20detail%20%3E%20\(member\)%201>)"auto"[](<#\(resource\)%20responses%20%3E%20\(model\)%20response_input_image%20%3E%20\(schema\)%20%3E%20\(property\)%20detail%20%3E%20\(member\)%202>)"original"[](<#\(resource\)%20responses%20%3E%20\(model\)%20response_input_image%20%3E%20\(schema\)%20%3E%20\(property\)%20detail%20%3E%20\(member\)%203>)[](<#\(resource\)%20responses%20%3E%20\(model\)%20response_input_image%20%3E%20\(schema\)%20%3E%20\(property\)%20detail>)type: "input_image"The type of the input item. Always `input_image`.[](<#\(resource\)%20responses%20%3E%20\(model\)%20response_input_image%20%3E%20\(schema\)%20%3E%20\(property\)%20type>)file_id: optional stringThe ID of the file to be sent to the model.[](<#\(resource\)%20responses%20%3E%20\(model\)%20response_input_image%20%3E%20\(schema\)%20%3E%20\(property\)%20file_id>)image_url: optional stringThe URL of the image to be sent to the model. A fully qualified URL or base64 encoded image in a data URL.formaturi[](<#\(resource\)%20responses%20%3E%20\(model\)%20response_input_image%20%3E%20\(schema\)%20%3E%20\(property\)%20image_url>)[](<#\(resource\)%20responses%20%3E%20\(model\)%20response_input_image%20%3E%20\(schema\)>)ResponseInputFile object { type, detail, file_data, 3 more } A file input to the model.type: "input_file"The type of the input item. Always `input_file`.[](<#\(resource\)%20responses%20%3E%20\(model\)%20response_input_file%20%3E%20\(schema\)%20%3E%20\(property\)%20type>)detail: optional "low" or "high"The detail level of the file to be sent to the model. Use `low` for the default rendering behavior, or `high` to render the file at higher quality. Defaults to `low`.One of the following:"low"[](<#\(resource\)%20responses%20%3E%20\(model\)%20response_input_file%20%3E%20\(schema\)%20%3E%20\(property\)%20detail%20%3E%20\(member\)%200>)"high"[](<#\(resource\)%20responses%20%3E%20\(model\)%20response_input_file%20%3E%20\(schema\)%20%3E%20\(property\)%20detail%20%3E%20\(member\)%201>)[](<#\(resource\)%20responses%20%3E%20\(model\)%20response_input_file%20%3E%20\(schema\)%20%3E%20\(property\)%20detail>)file_data: optional stringThe content of the file to be sent to the model.[](<#\(resource\)%20responses%20%3E%20\(model\)%20response_input_file%20%3E%20\(schema\)%20%3E%20\(property\)%20file_data>)file_id: optional stringThe ID of the file to be sent to the model.[](<#\(resource\)%20responses%20%3E%20\(model\)%20response_input_file%20%3E%20\(schema\)%20%3E%20\(property\)%20file_id>)file_url: optional stringThe URL of the file to be sent to the model.formaturi[](<#\(resource\)%20responses%20%3E%20\(model\)%20response_input_file%20%3E%20\(schema\)%20%3E%20\(property\)%20file_url>)filename: optional stringThe name of the file to be sent to the model.[](<#\(resource\)%20responses%20%3E%20\(model\)%20response_input_file%20%3E%20\(schema\)%20%3E%20\(property\)%20filename>)[](<#\(resource\)%20responses%20%3E%20\(model\)%20response_input_file%20%3E%20\(schema\)>)[](<#\(resource\)%20responses%20%3E%20\(method\)%20create%20%3E%20\(params\)%200.non_streaming%20%3E%20\(param\)%20input%20%3E%20\(schema\)%20%3E%20\(variant\)%201%20%3E%20\(items\)%20%3E%20\(variant\)%2025%20%3E%20\(property\)%20output%20%3E%20\(variant\)%201>)[](<#\(resource\)%20responses%20%3E%20\(method\)%20create%20%3E%20\(params\)%200.non_streaming%20%3E%20\(param\)%20input%20%3E%20\(schema\)%20%3E%20\(variant\)%201%20%3E%20\(items\)%20%3E%20\(variant\)%2025%20%3E%20\(property\)%20output>)type: "custom_tool_call_output"The type of the custom tool call output. Always `custom_tool_call_output`.[](<#\(resource\)%20responses%20%3E%20\(method\)%20create%20%3E%20\(params\)%200.non_streaming%20%3E%20\(param\)%20input%20%3E%20\(schema\)%20%3E%20\(variant\)%201%20%3E%20\(items\)%20%3E%20\(variant\)%2025%20%3E%20\(property\)%20type>)id: optional stringThe unique ID of the custom tool call output in the OpenAI platform.[](<#\(resource\)%20responses%20%3E%20\(method\)%20create%20%3E%20\(params\)%200.non_streaming%20%3E%20\(param\)%20input%20%3E%20\(schema\)%20%3E%20\(variant\)%201%20%3E%20\(items\)%20%3E%20\(variant\)%2025%20%3E%20\(property\)%20id>)[](<#\(resource\)%20responses%20%3E%20\(method\)%20create%20%3E%20\(params\)%200.non_streaming%20%3E%20\(param\)%20input%20%3E%20\(schema\)%20%3E%20\(variant\)%201%20%3E%20\(items\)%20%3E%20\(variant\)%2025>)CustomToolCall object { call_id, input, name, 3 more } A call to a custom tool created by the model.call_id: stringAn identifier used to map this custom tool call to a tool call output.[](<#\(resource\)%20responses%20%3E%20\(method\)%20create%20%3E%20\(params\)%200.non_streaming%20%3E%20\(param\)%20input%20%3E%20\(schema\)%20%3E%20\(variant\)%201%20%3E%20\(items\)%20%3E%20\(variant\)%2026%20%3E%20\(property\)%20call_id>)input: stringThe input for the custom tool call generated by the model.[](<#\(resource\)%20responses%20%3E%20\(method\)%20create%20%3E%20\(params\)%200.non_streaming%20%3E%20\(param\)%20input%20%3E%20\(schema\)%20%3E%20\(variant\)%201%20%3E%20\(items\)%20%3E%20\(variant\)%2026%20%3E%20\(property\)%20input>)name: stringThe name of the custom tool being called.[](<#\(resource\)%20responses%20%3E%20\(method\)%20create%20%3E%20\(params\)%200.non_streaming%20%3E%20\(param\)%20input%20%3E%20\(schema\)%20%3E%20\(variant\)%201%20%3E%20\(items\)%20%3E%20\(variant\)%2026%20%3E%20\(property\)%20name>)type: "custom_tool_call"The type of the custom tool call. Always `custom_tool_call`.[](<#\(resource\)%20responses%20%3E%20\(method\)%20create%20%3E%20\(params\)%200.non_streaming%20%3E%20\(param\)%20input%20%3E%20\(schema\)%20%3E%20\(variant\)%201%20%3E%20\(items\)%20%3E%20\(variant\)%2026%20%3E%20\(property\)%20type>)id: optional stringThe unique ID of the custom tool call in the OpenAI platform.[](<#\(resource\)%20responses%20%3E%20\(method\)%20create%20%3E%20\(params\)%200.non_streaming%20%3E%20\(param\)%20input%20%3E%20\(schema\)%20%3E%20\(variant\)%201%20%3E%20\(items\)%20%3E%20\(variant\)%2026%20%3E%20\(property\)%20id>)namespace: optional stringThe namespace of the custom tool being called.[](<#\(resource\)%20responses%20%3E%20\(method\)%20create%20%3E%20\(params\)%200.non_streaming%20%3E%20\(param\)%20input%20%3E%20\(schema\)%20%3E%20\(variant\)%201%20%3E%20\(items\)%20%3E%20\(variant\)%2026%20%3E%20\(property\)%20namespace>)[](<#\(resource\)%20responses%20%3E%20\(method\)%20create%20%3E%20\(params\)%200.non_streaming%20%3E%20\(param\)%20input%20%3E%20\(schema\)%20%3E%20\(variant\)%201%20%3E%20\(items\)%20%3E%20\(variant\)%2026>)ItemReference object { id, type } An internal identifier for an item to reference.id: stringThe ID of the item to reference.[](<#\(resource\)%20responses%20%3E%20\(method\)%20create%20%3E%20\(params\)%200.non_streaming%20%3E%20\(param\)%20input%20%3E%20\(schema\)%20%3E%20\(variant\)%201%20%3E%20\(items\)%20%3E%20\(variant\)%2027%20%3E%20\(property\)%20id>)type: optional "item_reference"The type of item to reference. Always `item_reference`.[](<#\(resource\)%20responses%20%3E%20\(method\)%20create%20%3E%20\(params\)%200.non_streaming%20%3E%20\(param\)%20input%20%3E%20\(schema\)%20%3E%20\(variant\)%201%20%3E%20\(items\)%20%3E%20\(variant\)%2027%20%3E%20\(property\)%20type>)[](<#\(resource\)%20responses%20%3E%20\(method\)%20create%20%3E%20\(params\)%200.non_streaming%20%3E%20\(param\)%20input%20%3E%20\(schema\)%20%3E%20\(variant\)%201%20%3E%20\(items\)%20%3E%20\(variant\)%2027>)[](<#\(resource\)%20responses%20%3E%20\(method\)%20create%20%3E%20\(params\)%200.non_streaming%20%3E%20\(param\)%20input%20%3E%20\(schema\)%20%3E%20\(variant\)%201>)[](<#\(resource\)%20responses%20%3E%20\(method\)%20create%20%3E%20\(params\)%200.non_streaming%20%3E%20\(param\)%20input%20%3E%20\(schema\)>)instructions: optional stringA system (or developer) message inserted into the model’s context. When using along with `previous_response_id`, the instructions from a previous response will not be carried over to the next response. This makes it simple to swap out system (or developer) messages in new responses.[](<#\(resource\)%20responses%20%3E%20\(method\)%20create%20%3E%20\(params\)%200.non_streaming%20%3E%20\(param\)%20instructions%20%3E%20\(schema\)>)max_output_tokens: optional numberAn upper bound for the number of tokens that can be generated for a response, including visible output tokens and [reasoning tokens](</docs/guides/reasoning>).minimum16[](<#\(resource\)%20responses%20%3E%20\(method\)%20create%20%3E%20\(params\)%200.non_streaming%20%3E%20\(param\)%20max_output_tokens%20%3E%20\(schema\)>)max_tool_calls: optional numberThe maximum number of total calls to built-in tools that can be processed in a response. This maximum number applies across all built-in tool calls, not per individual tool. Any further attempts to call a tool by the model will be ignored.[](<#\(resource\)%20responses%20%3E%20\(method\)%20create%20%3E%20\(params\)%200.non_streaming%20%3E%20\(param\)%20max_tool_calls%20%3E%20\(schema\)>)metadata: optional [Metadata](</api/reference/resources/$shared#\(resource\)%20%24shared%20%3E%20\(model\)%20metadata%20%3E%20\(schema\)>)Set of 16 key-value pairs that can be attached to an object. This can be useful for storing additional information about the object in a structured format, and querying for objects via API or the dashboard. Keys are strings with a maximum length of 64 characters. Values are strings with a maximum length of 512 characters.[](<#\(resource\)%20responses%20%3E%20\(method\)%20create%20%3E%20\(params\)%200.non_streaming%20%3E%20\(param\)%20metadata%20%3E%20\(schema\)>)model: optional [ResponsesModel](</api/reference/resources/$shared#\(resource\)%20%24shared%20%3E%20\(model\)%20responses_model%20%3E%20\(schema\)>)Model ID used to generate the response, like `gpt-4o` or `o3`. OpenAI offers a wide range of models with different capabilities, performance characteristics, and price points. Refer to the [model guide](</docs/models>) to browse and compare available models.One of the following:string[](<#\(resource\)%20responses%20%3E%20\(method\)%20create%20%3E%20\(params\)%200.non_streaming%20%3E%20\(param\)%20model%20%3E%20\(schema\)%20%2B%20\(resource\)%20%24shared%20%3E%20\(model\)%20responses_model%20%3E%20\(schema\)%20%3E%20\(variant\)%200>)"gpt-5.4" or "gpt-5.4-mini" or "gpt-5.4-nano" or 75 moreOne of the optional booleanWhether to allow the model to run tool calls in parallel.[](<#\(resource\)%20responses%20%3E%20\(method\)%20create%20%3E%20\(params\)%200.non_streaming%20%3E%20\(param\)%20parallel_tool_calls%20%3E%20\(schema\)>)previous_response_id: optional stringThe unique ID of the previous response to the model. Use this to create multi-turn conversations. Learn more about [conversation state](</docs/guides/conversation-state>). Cannot be used in conjunction with `conversation`.[](<#\(resource\)%20responses%20%3E%20\(method\)%20create%20%3E%20\(params\)%200.non_streaming%20%3E%20\(param\)%20previous_response_id%20%3E%20\(schema\)>)prompt: optional [ResponsePrompt](</api/reference/resources/responses#\(resource\)%20responses%20%3E%20\(model\)%20response_prompt%20%3E%20\(schema\)>) { id, variables, version } Reference to a prompt template and its variables. [Learn more](</docs/guides/text?api-mode=responses#reusable-prompts>).id: stringThe unique identifier of the prompt template to use.[](<#\(resource\)%20responses%20%3E%20\(method\)%20create%20%3E%20\(params\)%200.non_streaming%20%3E%20\(param\)%20prompt%20%3E%20\(schema\)%20%2B%20\(resource\)%20responses%20%3E%20\(model\)%20response_prompt%20%3E%20\(schema\)%20%3E%20\(property\)%20id>)variables: optional map[string or [ResponseInputText](</api/reference/resources/responses#\(resource\)%20responses%20%3E%20\(model\)%20response_input_text%20%3E%20\(schema\)>) { text, type }  or [ResponseInputImage](</api/reference/resources/responses#\(resource\)%20responses%20%3E%20\(model\)%20response_input_image%20%3E%20\(schema\)>) { detail, type, file_id, image_url }  or [ResponseInputFile](</api/reference/resources/responses#\(resource\)%20responses%20%3E%20\(model\)%20response_input_file%20%3E%20\(schema\)>) { type, detail, file_data, 3 more } ]Optional map of values to substitute in for variables in your prompt. The substitution values can either be strings, or other Response input types like images or files.One of the following:string[](<#\(resource\)%20responses%20%3E%20\(method\)%20create%20%3E%20\(params\)%200.non_streaming%20%3E%20\(param\)%20prompt%20%3E%20\(schema\)%20%2B%20\(resource\)%20responses%20%3E%20\(model\)%20response_prompt%20%3E%20\(schema\)%20%3E%20\(property\)%20variables%20%3E%20\(items\)%20%3E%20\(variant\)%200>)ResponseInputText object { text, type } A text input to the model.text: stringThe text input to the model.[](<#\(resource\)%20responses%20%3E%20\(method\)%20create%20%3E%20\(params\)%200.non_streaming%20%3E%20\(param\)%20prompt%20%3E%20\(schema\)%20%2B%20\(resource\)%20responses%20%3E%20\(model\)%20response_input_text%20%3E%20\(schema\)%20%3E%20\(property\)%20text>)type: "input_text"The type of the input item. Always `input_text`.[](<#\(resource\)%20responses%20%3E%20\(method\)%20create%20%3E%20\(params\)%200.non_streaming%20%3E%20\(param\)%20prompt%20%3E%20\(schema\)%20%2B%20\(resource\)%20responses%20%3E%20\(model\)%20response_input_text%20%3E%20\(schema\)%20%3E%20\(property\)%20type>)[](<#\(resource\)%20responses%20%3E%20\(method\)%20create%20%3E%20\(params\)%200.non_streaming%20%3E%20\(param\)%20prompt%20%3E%20\(schema\)%20%2B%20\(resource\)%20responses%20%3E%20\(model\)%20response_input_text%20%3E%20\(schema\)>)ResponseInputImage object { detail, type, file_id, image_url } An image input to the model. Learn about [image inputs](</docs/guides/vision>).detail: "low" or "high" or "auto" or "original"The detail level of the image to be sent to the model. One of `high`, `low`, `auto`, or `original`. Defaults to `auto`.One of the following:"low"[](<#\(resource\)%20responses%20%3E%20\(method\)%20create%20%3E%20\(params\)%200.non_streaming%20%3E%20\(param\)%20prompt%20%3E%20\(schema\)%20%2B%20\(resource\)%20responses%20%3E%20\(model\)%20response_input_image%20%3E%20\(schema\)%20%3E%20\(property\)%20detail%20%3E%20\(member\)%200>)"high"[](<#\(resource\)%20responses%20%3E%20\(method\)%20create%20%3E%20\(params\)%200.non_streaming%20%3E%20\(param\)%20prompt%20%3E%20\(schema\)%20%2B%20\(resource\)%20responses%20%3E%20\(model\)%20response_input_image%20%3E%20\(schema\)%20%3E%20\(property\)%20detail%20%3E%20\(member\)%201>)"auto"[](<#\(resource\)%20responses%20%3E%20\(method\)%20create%20%3E%20\(params\)%200.non_streaming%20%3E%20\(param\)%20prompt%20%3E%20\(schema\)%20%2B%20\(resource\)%20responses%20%3E%20\(model\)%20response_input_image%20%3E%20\(schema\)%20%3E%20\(property\)%20detail%20%3E%20\(member\)%202>)"original"[](<#\(resource\)%20responses%20%3E%20\(method\)%20create%20%3E%20\(params\)%200.non_streaming%20%3E%20\(param\)%20prompt%20%3E%20\(schema\)%20%2B%20\(resource\)%20responses%20%3E%20\(model\)%20response_input_image%20%3E%20\(schema\)%20%3E%20\(property\)%20detail%20%3E%20\(member\)%203>)[](<#\(resource\)%20responses%20%3E%20\(method\)%20create%20%3E%20\(params\)%200.non_streaming%20%3E%20\(param\)%20prompt%20%3E%20\(schema\)%20%2B%20\(resource\)%20responses%20%3E%20\(model\)%20response_input_image%20%3E%20\(schema\)%20%3E%20\(property\)%20detail>)type: "input_image"The type of the input item. Always `input_image`.[](<#\(resource\)%20responses%20%3E%20\(method\)%20create%20%3E%20\(params\)%200.non_streaming%20%3E%20\(param\)%20prompt%20%3E%20\(schema\)%20%2B%20\(resource\)%20responses%20%3E%20\(model\)%20response_input_image%20%3E%20\(schema\)%20%3E%20\(property\)%20type>)file_id: optional stringThe ID of the file to be sent to the model.[](<#\(resource\)%20responses%20%3E%20\(method\)%20create%20%3E%20\(params\)%200.non_streaming%20%3E%20\(param\)%20prompt%20%3E%20\(schema\)%20%2B%20\(resource\)%20responses%20%3E%20\(model\)%20response_input_image%20%3E%20\(schema\)%20%3E%20\(property\)%20file_id>)image_url: optional stringThe URL of the image to be sent to the model.
